title: florasion/D-VQVAE
abstract:
Code for Decomposed Vector-Quantized Variational Autoencoder for Human Grasp Generation

# DVQ-VAE Training and Generation This repository contains code for training the DVQ-VAE model and generating dynamic grasps. ## Usage Instructions ### 1. Train DVQ-VAE Run the following command to train the DVQ-VAE model: or download checkpoints from https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1eVytP-yYs0F6iBbo5qu3jhCRmUwI8hVm?usp=drive_link ### 2. Generate Dynamic Grasps for Objects To generate dynamic grasps for objects, run: ### 3. Generate Deformation GIFs To generate deformation GIFs, run:
abstract_zh: 本仓库提供了分解式向量量化变分自编码器（DVQ-VAE）模型的训练代码，用于生成动态抓取动作。使用方法：1. 训练DVQ-VAE模型，或从Google Drive下载预训练检查点；2. 为物体生成动态抓取；3. 生成变形GIF。
tldr_zh: 提出DVQ-VAE模型用于生成动态人手抓取动作。
cover_zh: 手部抓取也能AI生成？这个分解式VQ-VAE让动态抓取更自然

judge.reason: 官方代码，面向人形抓取生成的VQ-VAE模型，属于操作方向。
